name: @barlevalon/find-skills-skill
description_en: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be use...
description_zh: 当用户询问"我如何做 X"、"为 X 找一个技能"、"是否有可以...的技能"或表达对扩展功能的兴趣时，帮助用户发现和安装代理技能
